creator: jrtc27@freebsd.org
text: FreeBSD is a volunteer-led project, and that's particularly true of riscv64. Nobody owes you any patches, and nobody stopped you providing one for IFUNCs. It is quite frankly rude to complain about the fact that I took the time to write it for you just because I didn't do so as early as you wanted. Not to mention that this is entirely off-topic for this bug report.
